title: Runestones
description: Adds non-consumable runestones to (mostly) your early game!
body:
![runestones_banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c02f763b2b7f7acf369e956cc6b11f571dc62ba5.png)

# Welcome to yet another one of my mods! This mod adds new runestones with special abilities!

<center>

### Join our discord to stay up to date with mod updates, teasers, and more! (click)
[![Discord banner image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cea9cd7dc8511b56c21d5eef30b040a9f9f81d2.png)](https://discord.gg/mEYDh4SUWN)

</center>

(If you find a bug, report it on the [curseforge page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/runestones))

## INFO

>Runestones is a mod which adds a new type of tool to your game: Runestones. (who would've guessed..) Runestones are useable items usually with around 64 durability. Each runestone has a unique effect, ranging from simply giving potion effects, to conjuring up a sword.

## RUNESTONES

> ### Plain Runestone

The main resource used for all basic runestones, it has no special ability, and is made with 1 stone and 4 amethyst shards

![The plain runestone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab1e250ee2176c4e430f078caea6f76e560bc937.png)

> ### Strength Runestone

This runestone grants the user strength for 12 seconds, with a 24 second cooldown

![The strength runestone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0159f4dbd191e89884abc79f188c84c88c7198df.png)

> ### Swiftness Runestone

This runestone grants the user speed for 10 seconds, with a 21 second cooldown

![The swiftness runestone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07802b580682c23dab0e7a490d45a17792e7a39c.png)

> ### Resistance Runestone

This runestone grants the user resistance for 15 seconds, with a 31 second cooldown

![The resistance runestone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f851c6f37d79c726c6258b095069662a5006aac.png)

> ### Fury Runestone

This runestone grants the user strength for 9 seconds and haste 2 for 10 seconds, with a 27 second cooldown

![The fury runestone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54dd942811c4e321a4f1bfda5b799dfbb6aca160.png)

> ### Thunder Runestone

This runestone summons lightning on targets in a 8 block radius, but it doesn't target some mobs in particular, such as wolves, villagers, and others. It also doesn't target entities that aren't considered "living" (items, boats, item frames, ect). However, they still target wandering traders. Have as much fun killing them as you want

![The thunder runestone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31370e4e24055df577d1d9d716f2bee28a93b2bd.png)

> ### Restoration Runestone

This runestone heals the player by 6 health (or 3 hearts) when used, with a 20 seconds cooldown

![The restoration runestone in a cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18043ed51822b12907f9ad4dcc778a12abfccb47.png)

> ### Blade Runestone

This runestone grants the user with a spirit blade that lasts for 15 seconds and has a 30 second cooldown, The blade has 7.5 attack damage and 1.7 attack speed. Putting the blade in item frames or dropping it simply deletes both of them when the sword would usually disappear in your inventory.

![The blade runestone and the spirit blade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6122c5915640b8c399285ea00a1e2485b66bbc76.png)

## ARCANE RUNESTONES

> ### Arcane Runestone

The main resource for crafting more complex runestones, it's made with a normal runestone and an end crystal in a smithing table (if you're on fabric, it's crafted together instead)

![The arcane runestone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc8fda0c46f1175c707a41a5a76aa954c89d7d3c.png)

> ### Flight Runestone

This runestone gives the user creative flight for 1.5 seconds, with a 34 second cooldown
(Not actually made with an elytra)

![The flight runestone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89beae911695de7d89ae9c79cd4f12e5193f1af2.png)

## STATUS EFFECTS

> ### Flight

The effect gained when using the Flight Runestone, it grants creative flight when active

![The flight status effect applied on a player](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ee713d9b3bb72731c74b8bc0c309ea8cebe30bf.png)

## Q&A

> Q: Quilt?

A: Just use the fabric version

> Q: Will you backport fabric to below/above 1.20.1 and 1.20.4? Or forge below/above 1.19.2?

A: No. Porting versions is buggy, annoying and generally unenjoyable. Modding is my passion project. If i dont enjoy modding, i won't mod. The only exception is most likely Forge 1.19.4

> Q: Can i use this in my modpack?

A: Sure, You can give credit if you want, but i won't enforce it.
